arts.ttl: Championship midfielder linked with January transfer to Portsmouth and Oxford told contract won't be renewed
arts.sum: Midfielder Ryan Ledson will leave Preston North End at the end of the season - just months after being linked with a move to Pompey.

arts.ttl: ‘Where we are with playing budgets...’: Portsmouth boss’ honest talk after jaw-dropping Championship figures detailed
arts.sum: John Mousinho acknowledged Pompey’s place at the foot of the Championship spending hierarchy after the eye-watering spending on agents was confirmed.

arts.ttl: ‘I would suggest…’: EFL pundit’s massive Portsmouth call in Championship survival battle with Derby County, Cardiff City, Plymouth Argyle & Co
arts.sum: Pompey will be playing Championship football again next season after a pivotal moment in their survival battle.

arts.ttl: 27-year-old set for Preston North End exit, Portsmouth eyed winter deal
arts.sum: PNE midfielder Ryan Ledson is set to leave the Championship club this summer, according to reporter Mike McGrath.… The post 27-year-old set for Preston North End exit, Portsmouth eyed winter deal appeared first on The72 - Football League News.
